query:
-- Look at all SasBoss services for the negative-margin $49 customers to understand context
SELECT 
  s.externalId,
  s.planName,
  s.serviceType,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  MAX(c.name) as customerName
FROM services s
JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE s.customerExternalId IN (
  SELECT customerExternalId FROM services 
  WHERE supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND monthlyCost = 49.00 AND monthlyRevenue < 49.00
)
AND s.supplierName = 'SasBoss'
GROUP BY s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue, s.customerExternalId
ORDER BY s.customerExternalId, s.monthlyCost DESC;
command:

-- Look at all SasBoss services for the negative-margin $49 customers to understand context
SELECT 
  s.externalId,
  s.planName,
  s.serviceType,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  MAX(c.name) as customerName
FROM services s
JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE s.customerExternalId IN (
  SELECT customerExternalId FROM services 
  WHERE supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND monthlyCost = 49.00 AND monthlyRevenue < 49.00
)
AND s.supplierName = 'SasBoss'
GROUP BY s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue, s.customerExternalId
ORDER BY s.customerExternalId, s.monthlyCost DESC;
